opportunities.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer - SuperApp
opportunities.description:
The SuperApp squad owns parts the merchant experience across Web, Android, iOS and the flows that millions of small business owners use every day to run and grow their businesses. As our dedicated full stack web engineer within the squad, you'll own this space entirely, shaping technical direction, driving feature parity for SumUp's web experience. If you want real ownership, a broad scope, and work that lands directly in the hands of millions of merchants, this is the role.

opportunities.description:
[Hiring] [USA] Letter assembly and mailing from home, $0.60 per letter (~$24 per hr)

Hi everyone! My tech startup is testing an unconventional distribution channel that uses physical mail. I’ve so far been assembling and mailing these letters myself, but I’m looking at bringing on someone else to see if we can run this channel remotely. This is a pretty straightforward job that actually feels kind of crafty. You’ll work from home to assemble letters and mail them out.
